# FastGPT LLM Context

FastGPT provides separate LLM context files for English and Chinese.
FastGPT 提供英文和中文两份独立的 LLM 上下文文件。

- English: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
- 中文: https://fastgpt.io/zh/llms.txt

Other localized pages use the English LLM context:
其他语言页面统一使用英文 LLM 上下文：

- 日本語: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
- العربية: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
- Tiếng Việt: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
- ไทย: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
- Bahasa Indonesia: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
- Bahasa Melayu: https://fastgpt.io/en/llms.txt
